title: Craftable Bells
description: A simple datapack and mod that makes bells craftable. Useful for creative builds.
body:
## Craftable Bells Datapack and mod

This Minecraft datapack and mod makes bells craftable, allowing you to easily obtain them without needing to find a village!

**Features:**

* **Simple Crafting Recipe:** Craft bells using common materials.

**Crafting Recipe:**

![crafting ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37195416280c629e5dedc05ac4a87f9fd52705dd.png)


**How to Install:**

Datapack Instructions:
1.  Download the datapack.
2.  Place the `.zip` file into the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world.
3.  Use `/reload` in-game or restart your world to enable the datapack.

Mod Instructions:
1.  Download the mod.
2.  Place the `.jar` file into the `mods` folder of your Minecraft installation.
3.  ]restart your game to enable the mod.

Enjoy more bells in your Minecraft world!
